compressed_prompt: List pros/cons of supernatural powers in json. Use markdown ticks. No commas.
response:
```json
{
  "pros": [
    `Ability to manipulate reality`
    `Enhanced senses`
    `Teleportation`
    `Healing`
    `Invisibility`
    `Telepathy`
    `Precognition`
  ]
  "cons": [
    `Unpredictable consequences`
    `Loss of control`
    `Attracting unwanted attention`
    `Moral dilemmas`
    `Physical or mental strain`
    `Dependence on powers`
    `Vulnerability to countermeasures`
  ]
}
```
